name: Banco Hipotecario S.A.
summary: Banco Hipotecario S.A. provides wholesale and retail banking services in Argentina. The company offers sight and term deposits; mortgage, personal, corporate, and SME loans, as well as individual loans for home construction, enhancement, completion, repair, and acquisition; credit cards; and insurance products, including credit life, fire, personal accident, home, life, ATM theft, personal property, purchase protection, unemployment, and health insurance. It also provides investment; cash management; and corporate electronic, home, and mobile banking services. The company operates through 74 branches. Banco Hipotecario S.A. was founded in 1886 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
